content.en:
The Lord of Qingyuan came to the Valley of Myths through a crack.

When he came to the Valley of Myths and saw that many of the Mythical Spirits here had been killed, he didn't care.

After all, Yuan should have broken through to the Eternal Dao Realm, and there was naturally no problem in killing all the mythical spirits here.

Wow!

After he came out of the Valley of Mythology, he came to the Void Realm.

Then, I sensed it.

"Without the breath of Mogu, it seems that he is dead!"

Qingyuan Country Lord said secretly.

However, it doesn't matter to him, it's good to have one of the two seeds successful.

He had left two seeds here in the first place, and he had only let them compete with each other so that they could practice hard, and he didn't expect them both to succeed.

After all, unless they succeed at the same time, once one succeeds, the other will surely die.

Wow!

After sensing Yuan's breath, the Qingyuan Country Lord quickly shuttled over.

Soon.

He came to the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and his eyes saw through the layers of void and saw Yuan.

......

"Qingyuan Country Lord!"

The First Elder sensed the aura of the Qingyuan Country Lord, and immediately had some doubts.

The Lord of Qingyuan has left the endless years, why did he suddenly come back.

He came out of the temple of the elders and came into the realm of the void.

"I've seen the Lord of Qingyuan!"

The First Elder said respectfully.

"Yuan, you are very good, you have successfully cultivated the Qingyuan Dao Seed!" said the Qingyuan Country Lord with satisfaction.

The first elder hurriedly said: "It's just a fluke!"

"Since you have completed your practice, then give me your Qingyuan Dao seed!"

As he spoke, the division of the Qingyuan Kingdom Lord had changed, from a kind appearance to a hideous color, and there was a wisp of decay on his body.

The First Elder tried to escape, but the Lord of Qingyuan stopped him with a wave of his hand.

The First Elder was just an ordinary Eternal Supreme Dao Realm, how could he be the opponent of a country lord!

"Lord Qingyuan, what are you going to do?"

The First Patriarch panicked.

"What are you doing?" "What do you think I, you and Mogu are for, what do you think I taught you Qingyuan Dao Seed for?" Hahahaha, there is no risk of demon seed transformation of the Eternal Dao Seed, that is the perfect level Eternal Dao Seed, where will I have it, the Qingyuan Dao Seed you cultivate is just my Dao seed, the pseudo-Eternal Dao seed that has grown again. My Qingyuan Dao Seed has a high probability of becoming a demon seed, and I don't want to become a demon seed, so I can only cultivate you. After the ten pseudo-Qingyuan Dao Seeds are absorbed and refined by me, I will be able to stabilize my Eternal Dao Seed situation, and at least there will be no problems for a long time. "

The First Patriarch was shocked, and finally knew that he was just an experimental specimen of the Qingyuan Lord.

He also dreamed of becoming a powerhouse of the Eternal Dao Realm, surpassing Ye Tian.

But now, it's all just a dream.

"Why me?"

The First Elder asked.

"Because in the Eternal Realm, I don't dare to do this experiment, and once I find out, I'm finished. Therefore, I specially looked for places like the Void Domain, and even the Mythical Valley was arranged by me to prevent you from leaving the Void Domain. "

"I have countless experiments, you are just one of them, but the success rate is too low and too low, without the resources of the Eternal Realm, it is too difficult for you to cultivate into a pseudo-Qingyuan Dao seed!"

"Okay, I'm going to extract the pseudo-Qingyuan Dao seed from you!"

The right hand of the Qingyuan Country Lord grabbed into the body of the First Patriarch and grabbed the pseudo-Qingyuan Dao Seed.

The pseudo-Qing Yuan Dao Seed was caught, and the aura on the First Patriarch's body continued to decrease, and he actually fell from the Eternal Dao Realm to the Eternal Dao Realm, and his body became extremely weak.

After the Qingyuan Country Lord absorbed this pseudo-Qingyuan Dao Seed, the rotten aura on his body weakened a lot, and his state was much better.

"By the way, what's going on in the Void Domain, how did so many Eternal Dao Aura be born?"

Qingyuan Country Lord asked.

"I don't know!"

The First Elder shook his head, and secretly, he had already summoned Ye Tian, hoping that Ye Tian could save his life.

As for whether Ye Tian could beat the Qingyuan Lord, he didn't know, but he had no choice.

"It's okay if you don't say it, I'll just grab a few Eternal Daohua and ask!"

Saying that, the Qingyuan Country Lord was ready to kill the first elder, after all, the first elder was worthless.

He was going to find a suitable target in the Void Domain again, train him to cultivate the Pseudo-Qing Yuan Dao Species, and then create some disasters for this place, kill a large number of Eternal Dao powerhouses, and cut off their path out of the Void Domain.

But just as he was killing the first elder, a terrifying attack struck.

Burst!

The Qingyuan Nation Lord made a move to block, but his entire body was blasted out, but the First Elder was protected by a light shield and did not fall.

"The powerhouse of the Eternal Dao Body Dacheng Realm!!!!"

The Lord of Qingyuan was taken aback.

But he also understands why there are so many Eternal Dao powerhouses here, it turns out that this place has been discovered by the outside world!

He thought that Ye Tian was a powerhouse in the outside world, and he had come here and cultivated so many eternal supreme daoists.

"Thank you, Elder Ye Tian!"

The First Elder thanked.

"You'd better stay away!"

Ye Tianyi waved his hand, sent the first elder a little farther away, and immediately looked at the Qingyuan Lord.

"You are the Lord of Qingyuan Country, it turns out that you are using the pseudo-Eternal Dao Seed to stabilize the Eternal Dao Seed problem, I have to say, you are indeed a talent!" Ye Tian said.

"Your Excellency should be the Eternal Dao Realm of the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance, I can give up here, how about it? After all, you have nothing to lose. "Qingyuan Country Lord.

"Want to go?" Ye Tian said coldly: "The first elder is from my Innate Origin Domain Alliance, you want to kill him, and you also want to catch a few Eternal Daoists, and now the Eternal Daoists are all people of my human race, you are afraid that Zhao (the Emperor) wants to destroy the human race, continue your cultivation plan." "

The Qingyuan Country Lord was not afraid, and said coldly: "I admit that your strength is much more powerful than the Eternal Supreme Dao Realm of the ordinary Eternal Dao Body Dacheng Realm, but my Eternal Dao Body is perfect, and in terms of strength, you are not my opponent." "

"yes, then come on, Dong!"

Ye Tian killed the Qingyuan Lord.

It was impossible for him to let the Qingyuan Nation Lord leave, once the Qingyuan Monarch left, then this place would be exposed.

He wants to put an end to that.

In any case, the Lord of Qingyuan must die.

Moreover, his other replica bodies have sealed off the Valley of Myths.

Rumble!!!!!!

Ye Tian and the Qingyuan Kingdom Lord were killed, and with the perfect Eternal Dao Body of the Great Cheng Realm and the extremely powerful Ruin Sun Dao Species, his strength was even more powerful than that of the ordinary Eternal Dao Body Consummation Realm powerhouse.

All of a sudden, the lord of Qingyuan was suppressed.
